ogTitle: Pelican Lagoon vs Pellaring Flat: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pelican Lagoon and Pellaring Flat.
heading: Pelican Lagoon vs Pellaring Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pelican Lagoon, South Australia and Pellaring Flat, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pelican Lagoon has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Pellaring Flat (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pelican Lagoon or Pellaring Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pelican Lagoon has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Pellaring Flat scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pelican Lagoon scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Pellaring Flat scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pelican Lagoon or Pellaring Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pelican Lagoon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
